obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a b : Arr), lcsLength a b ≤ a.length ∧ lcsLength a b ≤ b.length
obligations.nl_gloss: The result is bounded above by the lengths of both inputs.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a b : Arr), ∃ (ia ib : List Nat), CommonSubseq a b ia ib ∧ ia.length = lcsLength a b
obligations.nl_gloss: There exists a common subsequence of length equal to the returned value.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a b : Arr) (ia ib : List Nat), CommonSubseq a b ia ib → ia.length ≤ lcsLength a b
obligations.nl_gloss: No common subsequence is strictly longer than the returned value.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a b : Arr), lcsLength a b = lcsLength b a
obligations.nl_gloss: LCS length is symmetric in its arguments.
